title: cyathea nicklesii
intro: Cyathea nicklesii, also known as the Nikau palm, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. The leaves of the Cyathea nicklesii plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the leaves of the Cyathea nicklesii plant have been prepared into teas, infusions, and poultices for medicinal use, although modern herbal preparations often involve drying and powdering the leaves for easier consumption.
